official_title:
Annex B Format for providing public comments to DIFCA on Consultation Paper No.1 of 2022 Proposed Amendments to the Real Property Law Note 1: DIFCA reserves the right to publish, including on its website, any comments you provide. However, if you wish to remain anonymous, you must expressly request at the time of making comments that this should be the case Note 2: The second column, ‘comments on proposed policy’ relates to the policy explained in the CP paragraphs specified. The third column, ‘comments on legislation’ refers to the draft legislation reflecting the proposed policy : It is possible that you may not have any comments, either on the proposed policy or draft legislation, or may have comments on one and not the other. You may a blank column if you either agree to the proposed position, or you have no concerns relating it ote 4: If there are any ambiguities relating to the proposed policy or draft legislation, you may raise those in your comments
Name of individua
Comments on nronosed nolicvComments on leaiclation
Removal of right of Foreclosure you agree that there is a contradiction in the intention of the Real Property Law between the foreclosure remedy in favour of a Mortgagee er Articles 63(1)(e) and 70 and the equity of redemption principles under Article 58? If not, please provide details Q2: Do you have any further comments in this regard that you would like to be taken into consideration? Dubai International inancial Centre 1
